description_long: This is a roughly cubic stone block with a rugged, natural appearance and a mix of white, gray, and brown coloration. The surfaces are uneven, with one side displaying pronounced horizontal striations, while another is smoother and lighter in color, possibly indicating a freshly broken or cut face. The stone has visible textural variation, with some areas appearing more weathered and others showing a chalky or powdery residue. The edges are irregular and not sharply defined, suggesting it was quarried or broken from a larger mass rather than precisely shaped. The coloration and surface features imply a sedimentary or metamorphic origin, commonly found in urban landscaping or as a barrier in parks and streetscapes. Its substantial mass and solid construction make it suitable for use as an obstacle or boundary marker in public spaces.
description: A rugged, roughly cubic stone block with white, gray, and brown tones, featuring striated and smooth surfaces. Its irregular edges and varied texture suggest natural weathering and recent breakage.
description_view_0: This view highlights a striated, grayish face with rough texture and some white and brown discoloration.
description_view_1: This side shows a smoother, lighter surface with a blend of white and brown, and less pronounced texture.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the horizontal striations and a more uniform brownish-gray coloration.
description_view_3: This view reveals a mostly white, flat surface with a patch of gray and subtle textural variation.
attribute_location: urban park, roadside, or landscaped public space
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or grouped with similar stones as a barrier
attribute_pattern: Visible horizontal striations on one face, with mottled and irregular color patches; no artificial carvings.
attribute_weathering: Partially weathered with rough, uneven surfaces and some areas appearing freshly broken or cut.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved or grassy areas, often used to demarcate boundaries or prevent vehicle access; may be partially embedded in soil or surrounded by vegetation.
